title: Generation 7 (Generations x Cobblemon)
description: Contains Generation 7 Pokemon Models for the Generations mod with Cobblemon
body:
# Generation 7 This resource pack ONLY works with [Generations](https://modrinth.com/mod/generations-core) installed. It adds all the neccessary files to have the entire Generation 7 Pokemon display in new HD models, as well as enables them to be obtained. This resource pack works with BOTH Fabric and NeoForge versions. It is recommended to use our Modpacks to have everything, including this resourcepack and the others, installed in one simple click. [Generations NeoForge Modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/generations-modpack-forge) [Generations Fabric Modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/generations-modpack-fabric)

Pokemon Models & Animations
Dive into the world of Pokemon in Minecraft and enjoy high-poly Pokemon models. Our dedicated team has spent over 2 years developing a custom rendering engine called RareCandy from scratch to ensure smooth gameplay that hooks in seamlessly to Cobblemon. Explore the game with fully animated models, including idle, walk, run/fly, attack, sleeping, roar, fainting, and happy animations!

Expanded PokeDex
[Unlock the vast world of Pokemon with Generations](https://generations.gg/index.php/Pokemon), seamlessly integrating the complete PokeDex into Cobblemon, Generation 1 all the way through Generation 9. How does it work? Cobblemon already contains the essential files and species data for the entire PokeDex, so all we do is enable them, create spawn data, and bam. Magic!

How to Play
If you're new to modding, we highly recommend you use our modpack. We have two versions, [Forge](https://modrinth.com/modpack/generations-modpack-forge/) and [Fabric](https://modrinth.com/modpack/generations-modpack-fabric/). If you need help deciding, check our [Getting Started](https://generations.gg/index.php/Getting_Started) guide on our Wiki. Modpacks are typically one-click installers to get you started instantly, simply download the [Modrinth App](https://modrinth.com/app) and search Generations under the Modpacks tab, then hit install! Otherwise if you prefer a manual installation, download all of the dependencies listed on [our Downloads](https://generations.gg/index.php/Download) page and place them into your mods folder alongside the Generations jar. We highly advise you to refer to our [Installation Guide](https://generations.gg/index.php/Getting_Started) on our wiki for up-to-date information. No configs necessary, but if you wish to customize your gameplay please refer to our [Configuration Wiki Page](https://generations.gg/index.php/Configurations) on what all our various config settings do. Confused? Need help? You can join our [Discord](https://discord.gg/generations) or check out our [Getting Started](https://generations.gg/index.php/Getting_Started) guide on our Wiki

About Us
We're a team known previously as the Pixelmon Generations mod on 1.12.2 with millions upon millions of downloads over the span of 6+ years of development, Generations (now with a shortened name and rebrand) aims to add all features from the classic Pixelmon Generations mod you're familiar with into Generations for modern Minecraft and Cobblemon. Check out our [wiki](https://generations.gg/index.php/Main_Page) for more features and guides- there's just too many to list here! Just as with our source code, you can even create an account and edit/create wiki pages and guides on our website. Our whole project is by the players, for the players. Welcome to Generations and we hope you have fun! Yes, you can include us in your modpacks. We recommend joining our [Discord](https://discord.gg/generations) and advertising your modpacks in our modpack channel for greater visibility!

Links
Website/Wiki: https://generations.gg Discord/Support: https://discord.gg/generations Modpacks: [Forge](https://modrinth.com/modpack/generations-modpack-forge/) / [Fabric](https://modrinth.com/modpack/generations-modpack-fabric/) Our Mods: [Generations Core](https://modrinth.com/mod/generations-core) / [Generations Structures](https://modrinth.com/project/generations-structures) Source Code: https://github.com/GenerationsMod/Generations-Core
